name: Apple Brandy Praline Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the praline topping and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, and salt. Beat in eggs, corn syrup, melted margarine, and brandy. Stir in apples.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie crust and sprinkle with the praline topping.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until puffed and set. Cool completely on a wire rack.
